title: Welsh Rarebit
description: A classic British dish originating from Wales, this Welsh Rarebit recipe combines melted cheese with a rich and tangy sauce, served over toasted bread.
instructions: 2. In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the flour and whisk to form a paste.
5. Add the mustard and Worcestershire sauce, whisking to combine.
6. Gradually add the beer, whisking to prevent lumps.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
8. Reduce the heat to low and add the cheese, stirring until melted and smooth.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Place the toasted bread slices on a baking sheet.
11. Spoon the cheese sauce over the bread.
12. Place under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, until the top is golden brown.
